headline: 3 Healthcare Stocks We Think Twice About
summary: From novel pharmaceuticals to telemedicine, most healthcare companies are on a mission to drive better patient outcomes. Shareholders who bet on the industry have seen decent returns lately as healthcare stocks were up 4.1% over the past six months, almost identical to the S&P 500.
